rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.109 governs school safety and security committee composition and duties. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: Sec. 37.109. SCHOOL SAFETY AND SECURITY COMMITTEE.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this school safety committee statute.
